text:
Remote MCP, railway agent in the CLI, one-command skills install 

Changelog Time!

It's Friday and you know what that means! Here's a summary of the stuff we shipped this week:

Railway Remote MCP server
Railway Agent in the CLI
One-command Railway skills install
Fixes and improvements
Read the changelog

If you have any thoughts/feedback on the changes we're making, reach out on Central Station!

Regards,
Your friends at Railway

Welcome to the Claude Platform Welcome to the Claude Platform


You now have access to the Claude API. Here's the fastest path to making your first call:
 
Get your API key


Create your API key in the Claude Console and set it as an environment variable:


export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY='your-api-key-here'
 
Make your first call


Choose your preferred client—cURL, Python, TypeScript, or Java. This quickstart guide provides example code for you to copy and run immediately.
Get your API key
Explore what's possible


Check out these resources to get the most out of the Claude Platform:
 
Quickstarts


Explore projects that you can easily build upon and customize for your specific needs.
 
Cookbooks


Build on the Claude API using ready-to-copy code snippets that you can integrate into your projects.
 
Anthropic Academy


Learn with step-by-step lessons on how to build effectively with Claude.
Explore developer docs
 
 
 

Anthropic PBC, 548 Market St, PMB 90375, San Francisco, CA 94104
